title: gossypium arboreum var. obtusifolium
intro: Gossypium arboreum var. obtusifolium, also known as the small-leafed cotton tree or jute mallow, is a plant species within the cotton family (Malvaceae) that is native to Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gossypium arboreum var. obtusifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural dye.
